meaning: n.照相师,摄影师(尤指电影)
examples: I asked the cameraman to give me some cutaways for the interviews.
Ironically, for a man who hated war, he would have made a superb war cameraman.
I had a neighbor who worked as a documentary cameraman.
There was no immediate way for the AP to verify who the cameraman was.
Fortunately cameraman Scottie is an old hand at these situations and we'd gone in prepared.
